top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran Conflict Threatens Long-Term Energy Shock Across Asia
top_signals.summary: The impact of the war between the United States and Iran on oil-importing nations in Asia could last years or even decades because of these countries’ heavy dependence on those imports, energy analyst Vandana Hari of Vanda Insight has warned. “There is a growing dependency on imports, and with that comes a dependency — or a vulnerability — to geopolitics,” Hari said at a Bloomberg event in Singapore. “I think we are in a geopolitical flux; I think this is going to remain with us for decades, definitely years.”…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘False dawn’: June inflation falls to 2.6 per cent but analysts say rises ahead
top_signals.summary: Inflation remained stuck above the Bank of England’s target rate despite government promises to tackle the cost of living.  The Office for National Statistics said consumer price index (CPI) inflation was 2.6 per cent in the year to June. Analysts predicted the price growth reading to be 2.7 per cent, lower than the 2.8 per [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Rubio, Jaishankar Urge Trade Deal Despite Pharma Tariff Threat
top_signals.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and his Indian counterpart S. Jaishankar reinforced the importance of concluding an interim trade agreement between their two countries during a meeting in Manila on Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Generic problems, AI valuations and earnings on tap
top_signals.summary: President Trump takes fresh aim at the pharmaceutical sector, with a plan to levy 100% tariffs on generic drugs as he targets key areas ahead of the midterms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump plans generic drug tariffs from 2028 with two-year delay testing U.S. onshoring push
top_signals.summary: The latest tariff salvo underscored Trump's goal of reshoring low-cost drug production, but displacing established suppliers like India won't be easy.

top_signals.title: Nagoya basho enters final stretch with everything to play for
top_signals.summary: Aonishiki's push for both the Emperor's Cup and a return to ōzeki has become the defining story of Nagoya, but several dangerous challengers remain firmly in the hunt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
